subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。親指の輪に4本の指を上から入れて糸を移し取ります。取った糸は手首の向こう側に自然に落ちます
subtitle.en: Begin with the Index Finger Base. Insert the four fingers of each hand (except the thumbs) from above into the thumb loops and transfer the strings to them. The transferred strings will naturally fall toward the backs of the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 両方の親指で、人差し指の2本の糸を越えて小指の手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the two index strings and pick up from below the near little-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指を、人差し指の前にある輪の中に上から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both index fingers from above into the loops in front of the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両方の小指の糸を外し、両手を左右に引きます。人差し指にかかっていた糸は自然に落ちます
subtitle.en: Release both little-finger strings and pull the hands apart. The strings that were on the index fingers will naturally fall.

subtitle.ja: 両手の甲にかかっていた糸を外し、両手を左右に引きます。外した糸は親指と人差し指の間に乗ります
subtitle.en: Release the strings that were across the backs of the hands and pull the hands apart. The released strings will rest between the thumbs and index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 先ほど親指と人差し指の手前に乗せた糸を、左右の小指で下から掴みます
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up from below the strings that were resting in front of the thumbs and index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指の糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Release both thumb strings to complete the figure.
